To Compel Trustee To Follow Terms Of Trust.
Off Calendar Apr-26-2011 Continued To May-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Shustoff for Maria Benedet (Petitioner/Trustee). Brian Collins for Ann Springer (Beneficiary).

Mr. Shustoff requested a continuance stating that they were still negotiating a possible settlement. The matter was continued to May 24, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Apr-26-2011 Continued To May-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Compel Trustee To Follow Terms Of Trust.
Off Calendar Mar-08-2011 Continued To Apr-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Collins for and with Anne Springer. Mark Shustoff for and with Maria Del Carmen Benedet.

Mr. Shustoff stated that the Court wanted them to seek a loan to pay off the debt, that various attempts were made at Patelco, , that they were unable to secure a loan, and that based on the income the properties receives there is no way that they could cover a loan payment. In addition, he stated that they were exploring other options such as: 1) Ms. Springer buying out the other residual beneficiaries, 2) Ms. Springer possibly obtaining a loan to pay the note and then an arrangement to repay her, and 3) the possibility of selling the property and dissolving the Trust. Mr. Collins stated that they also sought loans with Ms. Springer, that the loans were not acceptable, and that they would like to explore other options. The Court continued both petitions to April 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-08-2011 Continued To Apr-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Compel Trustee To Follow Terms Of Trust.
Off Calendar Feb-08-2011 Continued To Mar-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Collins for and with Anne Springer (Beneficiary). Mark Shustoff for and with Maria Benedet (Trustee).

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Ms. Springer moving into the house, her ability to pay the mortgage, whether a loan could be obtained, concerns about foreclosure in the future and mediation. The matter was continued to March 8, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to sort out whether a loan could be obtained, payment of the loan and verification of income.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Feb-08-2011 Continued To Mar-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Continued To Feb-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
